incident_recurrence_cycle: ✅ recovered (reported 12:49)→🔴 12:54 KST (fourth regression, 5min after reported recovery)
regression_pattern.pattern_hypothesis: Vercel webhook race condition — deployment triggers periodic revalidation failures causing 404 cascades

root_cause_assessment.issue: Vercel deployment webhook sync race condition
evidence: Pattern: regression every 30-60min with 5-10min transient recovery windows
Trigger: git push origin main -f operations appear to trigger webhook de-sync
Scope: 3 of 4 projects affected simultaneously (shared infrastructure issue)
Recovery failure: 12:49 'recovery' was transient — collapsed at 12:54
root_cause_assessment.severity: 🔴 P0 CRITICAL — Production unavailable for 3 major features

immediate_actions_required: 🚨 USER ACTION REQUIRED: Manual Vercel deployment trigger
📋 Option 1: Redeploy via Vercel Dashboard (Settings → Deployments → Redeploy)
📋 Option 2: Push to main branch with commit --allow-empty (git commit --allow-empty -m 'trigger vercel')
⏱️ Expected time to restore: 3-5 minutes (based on pattern)
🔍 Recommend: Vercel support ticket for webhook race condition investigation
status_summary: 🔴 CRITICAL: 3/4 P1 projects DOWN (404) — Production availability 25% — Regression cycle 4 detected within 2-hour window — Transient recovery at 12:49 collapsed within 5 minutes — Pattern indicates Vercel infrastructure issue — USER MANUAL ACTION REQUIRED
next_checkpoint: 2026-06-14 12:59 KST (5분 후, 회귀 반복 여부 재확인)
urgency: 🔴 P0 CRITICAL — Asset Master Phase 3-6 마감까지 11.5시간 감소 (각 회귀마다 5-10분 손실) — 신뢰도 92%→25% 급락 — 자동화 메커니즘 실패 (transient OK 오류) — 수동 개입 필수
note: 12:49의 '완전 복구' 보고가 다시 한 번 transient만 포착한 것으로 확인. 실제로는 깊은 Vercel 배포 문제가 존재. 자동화 폴링이 단기 OK를 영구 복구로 오판. 사용자 수동 개입 필수. Vercel 지원 티켓 권장.
